toolu_tool-14419bd56e384ac9a99fd481a091c.prompt:
Explore the `04-Permanent` directory in the Obsidian vault at `D:\ai-graph-rag\AI Agent知识图谱`. I need to understand all the files and their categories for grouping notes with similar concepts.

1. First, list ALL files in `04-Permanent` (including subdirectories) using Glob
2. Then read a representative sample of files to understand their content categories
3. Pay special attention to:
   - Files in the root of 04-Permanent (these seem scattered)
   - Files already in subdirectories (智能体基础, 智能体范式, 核心技术, 工具与框架, 大语言模型, 综合)
   - Which root-level files overlap with subdirectory files (same name = duplicate or similar concept)
4. Identify conceptual groupings - e.g., all training-related concepts (预训练, SFT, 微调, RLHF, GRPO), all memory-related (短时记忆, 长时记忆, 向量存储, 上下文压缩), all protocol-related (MCP, A2A, ANP), all framework-related (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, etc.), all evaluation-related (准确率, 召回率, F1, AgentBench, etc.)

Report a complete inventory with:
- Full file list in root vs subdirectories
- Duplicate names (same file in root AND subdir)
- Proposed groupings by concept/category
- Which files should be merged together

Be thorough - read enough files to understand their content, not just titles.
